programme.title: Antarctica Dive
programme.desc: In Antarctica, the sea ice shelf has become thinner, putting the emperor penguin colony nesting there in danger as they could fall into the water. The MeteoHeroes must find out what is going on. That is a mission for Nix and Fulmen!

programme.title: Cat Bed
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat bed.

programme.title: Attack of the Shortbread Witch
programme.desc: Rose has handled giants, witches, and trolls, but now her mom is mad at her for secretly attending Fairy Tale Land school. Grounded, Rose must rescue Hawk, Astoria, and others, turned into biscuits by the Gingerbread Witch during cooking class.

programme.title: An A-mazing Winter Adventure
programme.desc: The kids must find their way out of Yoko's magical snow labyrinth in order to get to Ranger Loops' puppet show on time!

programme.title: Origami Box
programme.desc: How can you carry stuff with a sheet of paper? See what that paper can hold with a few simple folds!

programme.title: The Ouch! Awards 4
programme.desc: The Ouch Taxi is on the road once again as the doctors celebrate the outstanding, unbelievable, caring, and heroic achievements of this year's finalists and reveal the winners.

programme.title: The President (F.W. de Klerk) and The Pioneer (Valerie Amos)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, former President of South Africa and Nobel Peace Prize winner President F.W. de Klerk and first Black woman member of the British Government and pioneering British diplomat Valerie Amos share their life lessons.

programme.title: A Nut For a Jar of Tuna
programme.desc: A palindrome is a word, sentence or verse that reads the same backward as forward. Examples are RACECAR and KAYAK. In this episode we demonstrate how numbers can be converted into palindromes as well.

programme.title: Sickness Strikes
programme.desc: Liam is feeling very sick. Can he hold it down long enough to impress the coach with his shooting skills? Ice dancer Ella reveals just how much skating means to her. And disaster strikes for captain Emily when she falls on an already injured shoulder.

programme.title: An A-mazing Winter Adventure
programme.desc: The kids must find their way out of Yoko's magical snow labyrinth in order to get to Ranger Loops' puppet show on time!

programme.title: Origami Box
programme.desc: How can you carry stuff with a sheet of paper? See what that paper can hold with a few simple folds!

programme.title: The President (F.W. de Klerk) and The Pioneer (Valerie Amos)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, former President of South Africa and Nobel Peace Prize winner President F.W. de Klerk and first Black woman member of the British Government and pioneering British diplomat Valerie Amos share their life lessons.

programme.title: The Rare Bird
programme.desc: Gabi spots a rare woodpecker. Two members of the Worldwide Expedition Club come to lake Weewannanoh, hoping to see it. Did Gabi really see what she thinks she saw? Gabi is determined to prove that she was right. Can Doki keep the peace on this bird-watching expedition?

programme.title: Measuring Time
programme.desc: Back in the Middle Ages, methods for telling the time are a far cry from the ones we know today. Church bells and the position of the sun are pretty much all they've got. So inventors are constantly trying to come up with all kinds of new systems to measure time.

programme.title: Silverware
programme.desc: Re-using the silverware to make something so awesome that it has left us in awe!

programme.title: Surfing Snails
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers return to Table Mountain National Park in South Africa to discover the strange ways animals have adapted to survive in their secret worlds. Along the way they meet bats, surfing snails, and an army of ants protecting unusual plants.

programme.title: Vikings
programme.desc: Like Raven and Little Lewis, the famous giants of the northern mists, the Vikings, are master looters and navigators. Besides being bloody warriors and shrewd negotiators, the Vikings are also great explorers, out to discover the world.

programme.title: Yoko's Computer Game
programme.desc: Yoko gets the kids to appreciate nature by tricking them into thinking the park is actually a computer game!

programme.title: It's Hairy!
programme.desc: Can you lift a car with a ponytail? The doctors put the strength of human hair to the test and find out what makes different colours and types of hair.

programme.title: Eric, The Map, and the Compass
programme.desc: Eric learns how a compass works and makes one using a needle. He discovers that because of the iron at the centre of the Earth and the way the Earth spins, the magnetic field around our planet acts like a giant magnet.

programme.title: How Can You See in the Dark?
programme.desc: How do you see in colour? And how can your eyes see in the dark? It's time for Dr. Xand to become Night Vision Man! Plus, we witness a camera go inside Dr. Chris' lungs!

programme.title: Silverware
programme.desc: Re-using the silverware to make something so awesome that it has left us in awe!

programme.title: E9 - Giant Otter Refuge
programme.desc: Join biologists on a hike through a giant otter refuge in the southern Pantanal. Will they find these shy, elusive animals or just the evidence of their day-to-day lives? On the trail, check in on amorous tapirs and water-loving Muscovy ducks.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E4 - The Karst Caves
programme.desc: Explore the stunning caves of Khammouane province in Laos. These natural wonders, squeezed between the Mekong River and the Annamite Range, are home to part-time and full-time residents, including bats, geckos, frogs, and giant centipedes.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E2 - House Hunting Hermit Crabs
programme.desc: Get in line with hermit crabs for an orderly shell exchange on a Belize beach, then meet a Senegalese chimp’s pet genet. Float with an otter who swaps hostages for free meals and admire the agricultural prowess of leafcutter ants in the rainforest.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E9 - Giant Otter Refuge
programme.desc: Join biologists on a hike through a giant otter refuge in the southern Pantanal. Will they find these shy, elusive animals or just the evidence of their day-to-day lives? On the trail, check in on amorous tapirs and water-loving Muscovy ducks.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E4 - The Karst Caves
programme.desc: Explore the stunning caves of Khammouane province in Laos. These natural wonders, squeezed between the Mekong River and the Annamite Range, are home to part-time and full-time residents, including bats, geckos, frogs, and giant centipedes.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E2 - House Hunting Hermit Crabs
programme.desc: Get in line with hermit crabs for an orderly shell exchange on a Belize beach, then meet a Senegalese chimp’s pet genet. Float with an otter who swaps hostages for free meals and admire the agricultural prowess of leafcutter ants in the rainforest.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 2
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

Na Umra Ki Seema Ho
programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: E5 - Vision Quest

programme.title: E3 - Just-Terry-Fied
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be test 2 scenes from Justified where, Terry, aka Raylan Givins finds himself in a bathtub and a dead body lying over top of him. A woman stands near ready to end his life when Raylan shoots his service revolver through the dead body and into the woman killing her. Terry and Larry will also test to see if they can incapacitate a bad guy by shooting the steering wheel of the car to activate the airbag.

Sonya’s spiritual approach to life enlightens bear, and her sense of adventure inspires all.

programme.title: E3 - Just-Terry-Fied
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be test 2 scenes from Justified where, Terry, aka Raylan Givins finds himself in a bathtub and a dead body lying over top of him. A woman stands near ready to end his life when Raylan shoots his service revolver through the dead body and into the woman killing her. Terry and Larry will also test to see if they can incapacitate a bad guy by shooting the steering wheel of the car to activate the airbag.

programme.title: E6 - Solar Flares
programme.desc: Solar Flares - how can we protect mankind from the next big solar storm?

programme.title: E5 - Vision Quest

programme.title: E2 - 102
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet our house hunters Ella and Sa who are searching for a million dollar property in the bay side of Melbourne

programme.title: E2 - An Airplane's 2nd Life
programme.desc: A passenger aircraft is stripped down. But the aircraft is not decommissioned - it is given a special conversion and begins a second life as a cargo jet. In just a few months, 600 men and women transform a passenger jet into a long-haul cargo plane - a masterpiece of aeronautical engineering! During the conversion, they give the old aircraft up to 30 percent more storage space and reduce fuel consumption per tonne of payload by 20 percent. Various parts have to be converted or removed and replaced - there is a lot to do.

programme.title: The Observers

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E23 - Manta Ray
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Falo S17
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: E17 - Rohulla Hossiny (Afghanistan)
programme.desc: At 17, fleeing the Taliban, Rohullah Hossiny travels through Iran, Turkey, and Greece before arriving in Belgium. In Brussels, thanks to the Duo for a job association, he finds a mentor and joins Corica, where he becomes a master roaster. In turn, he trains other exiles.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada:2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: E3 - Clementine De Chabaneix/Nathalie And Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: E18 - Crazy For Tofu!
programme.desc: On the menu: Greek salad, orange tofu, tofu parmigiana submarine sandwich, oven-baked veggie tacos.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2:2025-2026
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Edgar-Yves Jr. - Le Prix De La Liberte
programme.desc: Edgar-Yves Junior grew up between Benin and France. His father, a former Beninese ambassador and minister, envisioned him as a lawyer. Yet he chose to become a comedian and advocates for intelligent and responsible freedom of expression. His sharp humor combines self-mockery, controlled provocation, and social reflection.

programme.title: E3 - Clementine De Chabaneix/Nathalie And Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. programme.title: Le Journal De France 2:2025-2026
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: E26 - Glasses
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: E14 - The Competitor
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Basik:2026
programme.desc: The programme which explores and explains the economy, examines our relationship to money and analyses our purchasing power. The economic, social and environmental challenges of tomorrow are covered in a direct, down-to-earth and occasionally mischievous manner!

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada:2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Echappees Belles S19
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! programme.title: Un Dimanche A La Campagne:2025-2026
programme.desc: A weekend together, far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. A moment out of time to get to know one another, talk of love, friendship, life. E152 - School Play
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends take part in a school play about Little Red Riding Hood, but Pedro Pony is nervous to be on the stage.

programme.title: E201 - Polly's Holiday
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa's pet, Polly Parrot comes to stay. Peppa and George love Polly Parrot. She is very funny and repeats everything anyone says. When Polly flies away, no one knows how to get her back, until George comes up with a very clever plan.

programme.title: E151 - Daddy's Movie Camera
programme.desc: Daddy gets a new video camera. First, Peppa shows him how to work it, and then he records Peppa being silly.

programme.title: E109 - Let Justice Be Done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: E403 - Captain Dora / Bruno And The Bunny Boyz
programme.desc: Dora and Boots track down the Pirate Piggies' ship and save it from a kraken! // Dora and Boots help Bruno the Bunny find his own special dance moves in time to perform with his favorite band, the Bunny Boyz!

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: E519 - The Treat Thief
programme.desc: Officer Blaze just got his biggest case yet: tracking down the mischievous Treat Thief! With help from Officer Anna, Blaze sets out to stop the thief and recover every stolen treat!

programme.title: E203 - Beach Scanner
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: E205 - Bedtime
programme.desc: It's nearly time for bed and Peppa and George are called in for their bath. After that, they brush their teeth and get into bed. Soon they are fast asleep. Mummy and Daddy Pig finally sit down, but it's been a long day and they are very sleepy too.

programme.title: E806 - Tire Trouble
programme.desc: Blaze and his pals are gearing up for a big race with brand new tires! But when Crusher tricks Starla, Darington and Stripes into putting on out-of-control SILLY tires, it's up to Blaze to rescue them and beat Crusher to the finish line!

programme.title: E313 - The Crew Builds A Mega Stunt Ramp / The Crew Builds A Solar Farm
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew use their giant trucks to make awesome stunt ramps when Speed Meister challenges Mayor Greatway to a stunt competition // When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E165 - Yosemite Samurai/ Bugs Hole Gags 2: Bees Nest/ Dummies In The Dark/Pain Rent / Nest E
programme.desc: Yosemite Sam is big in Japan. Elmer should “bee” more careful. It’s lights out for Porky and Daffy.

programme.title: E445 - Bean's Bath Bother/Sample Sale
programme.desc: Mr Bean’s bath keeps getting interrupted, so he ends up having one in the garden!

programme.title: E74 - The Romantic/The Uploads/The Wicked/The Origins - Pt 1/The Origins - Pt 2
programme.desc: After Gumball convinces himself that Penny doesn't love him as much as she used to, he decides to put together a romantic quest to remind her of all the good times they've had together. But Gumball's romantic gesture backfires, landing Penny - and maybe their relationship - in serious peril.

programme.title: E301 - The Missing
programme.desc: The Ninja follow a clue to Arin's location but find a new threat, while Nya, Kai and Wyldfyre spark old grudges in their search for Jay.

programme.title: E275 - The Wild Hunt/Always Bmo Closing/Son Of Rap Bear/Bonnibel Bubblegum/Seventeen
programme.desc: A fierce creature is terrorizing the Candy Kingdom but before Finn can slay the beast, he must first overcome a guilty conscience.

programme.title: E121 - The New Crystal Gems/Storm In The Room/Rocknaldo
programme.desc: Connie helps look after Beach City while Steven is busy.

programme.title: E109 - The Clocktopus/I Don't Like You/Steam Fight At The Ok Corral/Adrenaland Jr./Cutting C
programme.desc: In a peaceful coastal town, Ben must not only face the archaic antagonist Steam Smythe and his latest creation - the Clocktopus - but also his deepest, darkest fear: squid!

programme.title: E302 - The Ultimate Object Of Admiration
programme.desc: Arin nurses Ras back to health as they continue his training, meanwhile their trail leads the Ninja into more danger.

programme.title: E74 - The Romantic/The Uploads/The Wicked/The Origins - Pt 1/The Origins - Pt 2
programme.desc: After Gumball convinces himself that Penny doesn't love him as much as she used to, he decides to put together a romantic quest to remind her of all the good times they've had together. But Gumball's romantic gesture backfires, landing Penny - and maybe their relationship - in serious peril.

programme.title: E29 - Take Good Care Of Your Teeth/The Doberman's Favorite/A Fun Day Mushroom Hunting/Boast
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are detected at a tooth exhibition. Shiro examines the various models of animal teeth when Deca begins chasing after Shiro.

programme.title: E74 - The Romantic/The Uploads/The Wicked/The Origins - Pt 1/The Origins - Pt 2
programme.desc: After Gumball convinces himself that Penny doesn't love him as much as she used to, he decides to put together a romantic quest to remind her of all the good times they've had together. But Gumball's romantic gesture backfires, landing Penny - and maybe their relationship - in serious peril.

programme.title: Facial Recognition: Helpful Or Controlling?
programme.desc: Facial recognition is now part of daily life - unlocking phones, verifying identities, and helping law enforcement. But in government hands, it can become a serious threat to privacy and civil liberties.

programme.title: The Haydn Expedition, Part 2
programme.desc: Is Joseph Haydn's music boring? Not at all, say Paavo Jaervi and the musicians of the Deutsche Kammerphilharmonie Bremen. On their musical journey through Haydn's symphonic works, they discover new and surprising things.

programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: *Smiles And Kisses You* - In Love With An Ai-Powered Doll
programme.desc: Chris lives in North Carolina (USA) with his girlfriend Mimi, a life-size sex doll. He communicates with her using an AI app. A clear-eyed, fascinating look at AI and its social consequences.

programme.title: Good Skin Care, Skin Cancer Screenings And Removing Tattoos
programme.desc: What's the best skincare routine for your skin type? Plus: AI-assisted skin screenings, removing unwanted tattoos, and tackling herpes outbreaks.

programme.title: Women In Asia. Guardians Of Nature
programme.desc: Their stories inspire others to connect with nature. Women who are role models, leaders, educators and campaigners are paving the way for future generations. They want to share their awareness and understanding of nature with other women, tackling the lack of inclusion and representation in all outdoor spaces.

programme.title: Facial Recognition: Helpful Or Controlling?
programme.desc: Facial recognition is now part of daily life - unlocking phones, verifying identities, and helping law enforcement. But in government hands, it can become a serious threat to privacy and civil liberties.

programme.title: The Haydn Expedition, Part 2
programme.desc: Is Joseph Haydn's music boring? Not at all, say Paavo Jaervi and the musicians of the Deutsche Kammerphilharmonie Bremen. On their musical journey through Haydn's symphonic works, they discover new and surprising things.

programme.title: Sudan's Civil War - The Limits Of Humanitarian Aid
programme.desc: In Sudan, the government is waging a bloody civil war against rebels. An estimated 12 million people have fled their homes, either to destinations within the country or to neighboring states. Many of them are seeking help in Chad.

programme.title: Best Of DW Podcasts
programme.desc: Select DW podcasts enrich the program with current analyses of world politics and its influence on our daily lives. There will also be space in the program for lively discussions about social standards and taboos.

programme.title: Africa Reinvented
programme.desc: Afrimaxx is at one of South Africa's biggest car culture weekends. What started as a niche meet has now turned into a full-blown movement. Let's meet builders, collectors, and fans from across the country and beyond.

programme.title: Good Skin Care, Skin Cancer Screenings And Removing Tattoos
programme.desc: What's the best skincare routine for your skin type? Plus: AI-assisted skin screenings, removing unwanted tattoos, and tackling herpes outbreaks.

programme.title: Women In Asia. Guardians Of Nature
programme.desc: Their stories inspire others to connect with nature. Women who are role models, leaders, educators and campaigners are paving the way for future generations. They want to share their awareness and understanding of nature with other women, tackling the lack of inclusion and representation in all outdoor spaces.

programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: Sudan's Civil War - The Limits Of Humanitarian Aid
programme.desc: In Sudan, the government is waging a bloody civil war against rebels. An estimated 12 million people have fled their homes, either to destinations within the country or to neighboring states. Many of them are seeking help in Chad.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues with Grandma Gecko!
programme.desc: Grandma Gecko is here to help with some epic rescues! The action starts when Weasel's accelerator gets stuck & he can't stop driving! Grandma Gecko & Gecko hop on a motorbike for a high-speed chase to save him. Then, when lots of vehicles get flat tires from nails on the road, Gecko feels the pressure & calls his Grandma to help him speedily change all the tires. From building a wind turbine to saving Blue, Grandma can do it all!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E5 - Twinkle Bedtime Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.desc: Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.

programme.desc: A busy Theresa is desperate to plan a girls' night with her besties. While at lunch, Spirit pulls Theresa into a reading that finds a departed mom asking her daughter's boyfriend for a proposal!

programme.desc: Joanna and Leo seem to have it all: two adorable children and a beautiful house. But their perfect marriage begins to unravel when Piper arrives in town and sets her sights on Leo.

programme.title: E219
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: The newly launched observation documentary program. Each issue takes a foreigner as the protagonist, travels all over China and observes China's social conditions and Chinese people's life from a close perspective.

programme.title: E468

programme.title: Premium Spectacular
programme.desc: Premium Spectacular offers Phoenix's finest documentaries in our weekend prime time slot. Each episode comes relevant to the latest news that hits the headlines. programme.title: E132
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

E5 - Special Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Direction for to visit Rodin's home and studio. Ceramic artist Gregoire Scalabre sculpts and accumulates to enter another dimension, between tiny and gigantic. The John Galliano show for Maison Margiela: a journey through time and the strange. Artist Amandine Antunes masters the stucco marble technique.

programme.title: E2 - The Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum, Madrid, Modern Painting
programme.desc: The collections at the Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum also include works by some of the greatest modern painters, such as: Monet, Morisot, Van Gogh, Gauguin, Derain, van Dongen, Cezanne, Braque, Kandinsky...

programme.title: E13 - Vegetable Mille-Feuille
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Benoit Garnier, director of the Nogent Cutlery Museum, into her kitchen. He concocts a recipe that combines his love of Italian gastronomy with that of his homeland: a vegetable mille-feuille with langres cheese.

programme.title: E2 - Fontaine-L'eveque
programme.desc: New stop: heading to the province of Hainaut, between Charleroi and Binche, to Fontaine-l'Eveque, which also includes the former municipalities of: Leernes, Chateau Bivort and Forchies-la-Marche. Featuring visits to Chateau Bivort, the Gasometer Museum and the Petria slag heap, a Natura 2000 area.

programme.title: E20 - Var Special Programme
programme.desc: Hugo Guinet, organic market gardener and chicken farmer, sells his produce direct to consumers. All about truffle-hunting with the truffle grower Philippe de Santis, who offers his precious tubers at the market in Aups. The plant life of the Massif des Maures and underwater biodiversity of the Le Brusc lagoon.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 《膽小鬼》電視劇是由檸萌影業、優酷聯合出品，鄭執編劇，張曉波執導，歐豪、王硯輝領銜主演，王玉雯、周依然、侯雯元主演的青春懸疑犯罪短劇集。該劇改編自鄭執的長篇小說《生吞》，該劇講述了一段四個少年的青春往事，多年後一樁重現的罪案，讓所有人不得不面對人性最真實的「黑白戰爭」。
